style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow intensely beneath Slowpoke's body, emitting shimmering heat waves that distort the air around it. Ember sparks float upward in erratic bursts, while a crackling crimson aura pulses rhythmically, casting warm amber light that illuminates the surrounding area with a fiery glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
